# integrationGitHubEnterpriseServerConnect

Connects the organization with a GitHub Enterprise Server.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`GitHubEnterpriseServerPayload`](../objects/git_hub_enterprise_server_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `githubUrl` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The base URL of the GitHub Enterprise Server installation. |
| `organizationName` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The name of GitHub organization. |
